calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of Two Minors. Sophia Saxton & Sailor Saxton
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Dowling.

Sara Peters, Esq. for and with the Petitioner(s): Ron Saxton, as guardian ad litem for Saphia Saxton and Sailor Saxton, as minor Claimants, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved for each of the two minors.

Attorney's fees: $48,653.34
Costs & expenses total $5,339.96

A net balance of $175,000.00 as structured in the annuity as listed on Exhibit 1 attached to the Order, and $21,006.70 to be deposited into a blocked account withMerced School employees Federal Credit Union, Merced, CA. until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders signed by Judge Mason in open court.

Status hearing is set for 01-31-12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. for filing the receipt to deposit money into blocked account.
